notes:
Game defaults to windowed mode which - seeing as the game runs only in 640x480 - is painfully small. This can be remedied by forcing a fixed resolution via winecfg.

Dragging elements in the game sometimes causes graphical artifacts which really hinders gameplay
title: STAR WARS™ Rebellion

notes:
Dragging items in the game causes graphical artifacts to appear. These can be resolved by forcing a refresh of the area e.g. by closing and opening the window again. Forcing the window to fullscreen via my window manager (which results in the game in the topleft corner and the rest of the screen being black) pretty much 'fixes' this.

3D space battles immediately cause the game to crash.

Game has been completed multiple times with autoresolve of space battles.
title: STAR WARS™ Rebellion

notes: The game starts out with a small window of 640x480 resolution. Setting your desktop resolution to 800 x 600 or 1024x768 before launching the game is the easiest way to handle this. Using Set Launch Options to change the resolution would help but -fullscreen, -w, or -h did not work!
title: STAR WARS™ Rebellion

notes: The game is running only in windowed mode.
title: STAR WARS™ Rebellion
